installation_bundle.approval_prompt: Install or enable all missing 3080-brief Feishu dependencies listed in this plan? One approval covers every listed CLI command, companion Skill registration, and host-capability enablement action.
installation_bundle.on_approve: Execute every listed approval command, host-native registration, and capability-enablement action; stop on the first failure, reload the agent when required, then rerun the dependency check from the normal runtime.
installation_bundle.on_decline: Keep 3080-brief installed for non-Feishu output, install no optional Feishu dependency, and keep the Feishu path BLOCKED.
excludes: Node.js installation when no exact platform command is known

lark-doc.purpose: read the source Feishu/Lark document and create the new document
lark-doc.host_enable_prompt: Enable or install the current host's executable Feishu/Lark document workflow exposed as lark-doc. Loading or returning its SKILL.md/specification alone does not count. Reload the agent, confirm a real document read/create operation is callable, then rerun the dependency check with --host-capability lark-doc.

lark-whiteboard.purpose: write and inspect the editable Feishu/Lark whiteboard
lark-whiteboard.host_enable_prompt: Enable or install the current host's executable Feishu/Lark whiteboard workflow exposed as lark-whiteboard. Loading or returning its SKILL.md/specification alone does not count. Reload the agent, confirm a real whiteboard query/update operation is callable, then rerun the dependency check with --host-capability lark-whiteboard.
